title: Index misalignment in fuse_all when test cases have partial coverage
description: rankings_by_method filters case_ids with 'if cid in method_rankings', producing a shorter list. But the output loop iterates all case_ids using fused[qi] — misaligned indices cause silent wrong attribution or IndexError.

title: .env with API key not gitignored
description: .env contains a live Anthropic API key and is not listed in .gitignore. Any 'git add .' would commit the secret to repository history.

title: Instruction prefix asymmetry undocumented in embed.py
description: BGE queries get instruction prefix but targets don't. This is correct per BGE docs but undocumented — easy to change incorrectly by a future contributor.

title: run_bgem3 missing abbreviation expansion on queries
description: run_embedding_model applies expand_abbreviations to queries but run_bgem3 does not, creating inconsistent comparison conditions across models.

title: Augmented target ID counter overflow at 9999
description: ID format T-raug-{:04d} uses 4-digit counter. With ~692 roles * 5-10 aliases = up to 6920 targets it fits now, but taxonomy growth would break fixed-width assumption.

title: Target ID uniqueness not validated across granularities
description: target_lookup in evaluate.py is built from all granularities. Augmented IDs use T-raug prefix so no collision now, but no validation enforces this.

title: Lazy import scope fragility in embed.py
description: rerank_batch imported inside 'if reranking_enabled' block at line 139 but used in a different if block at line 172. Works in Python but fragile if refactored.

title: Reranker missing trust_remote_code=False and revision pin
description: load_reranker() instantiates CrossEncoder without trust_remote_code=False or revision pinning. Main load_model() correctly does both.

title: BGE-M3 missing trust_remote_code=False and revision pin
description: load_bgem3() calls BGEM3FlagModel without trust_remote_code restriction or revision pinning. Unlike main models which have revision hashes.

title: Fine-tuning loads models without trust_remote_code=False
description: train_tsdae() and train_contrastive() call SentenceTransformer() without trust_remote_code=False, bypassing the safety in load_model().

title: LLM response parsed without schema validation in augment.py
description: json.loads() result accessed with dict key lookups without validating structure. Malformed LLM output could produce corrupt augmented targets.

title: Abbreviation map reversal produces ambiguous mappings silently
description: If two full words share the same abbreviation, last one wins silently in dict comprehension. Currently 14 entries are unique but fragile.

title: _strip_code_fences crashes if LLM returns fences with no newline
description: content.index('\n') raises ValueError if LLM returns code fences with no newline. Unlikely but unhandled.

title: BGE-M3 sparse/ColBERT ranking uses O(Q*T*tokens) Python loops
description: rank_bgem3_sparse and rank_bgem3_colbert use nested Python loops. Slow for large taxonomies but acceptable for experiment scale.

title: fine_tune.py hardcodes model paths and hyperparameters
description: main() hardcodes base_model_id, tsdae_dir, final_dir instead of reading from config.yaml. The loaded config variable is unused.

title: generate_training_data.py calls generate_variants twice
description: generate_contrastive_pairs internally generates variants, then main() generates them again for TSDAE corpus. Redundant but deterministic.

title: Missing test for unknown role name fallback in augment.py
description: augment.py falls back to T-role-0000 for unmatched role names but no test covers this path. Silent placeholder could cause downstream issues.

title: Dead bm25 config entry in fusion configs
description: fusion-bge-large-bm25 references 'bm25' method but no BM25 implementation exists. fuse_all skips it safely but it's dead config.

title: model_label path traversal check should use allowlist
description: Current denylist blocks / and os.sep but an allowlist regex (^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$) would be stronger defense-in-depth.

title: Broader .gitignore patterns for secret-bearing files
description: .gitignore should include .env, .env.*, *.pem, *.key patterns for defense-in-depth against accidental secret commits.

title: No revision pin for BGE-M3 model in config.yaml
description: bgem3.model specifies BAAI/bge-m3 without revision hash. Inconsistent with other models which have pinned revisions.

title: No revision pin for cross-encoder reranker in config.yaml
description: reranking.model specifies cross-encoder/ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2 without revision hash.

title: Index misalignment in fuse_all when test cases have partial coverage
resolution: fuse_all now raises ValueError when a method is missing test cases instead of silently filtering

title: .env with API key not gitignored
Instruction prefix asymmetry undocumented in embed.py
resolution: Added comment documenting intentional BGE instruction asymmetry per model docs

title: run_bgem3 missing abbreviation expansion on queries
resolution: Added expand_abbreviations import and call in run_bgem3

title: Augmented target ID counter overflow at 9999
Lazy import scope fragility in embed.py
resolution: Refactored lazy import: assigned to local variable at import site for clear scope

title: Reranker missing trust_remote_code=False and revision pin
BGE-M3 missing trust_remote_code=False and revision pin
resolution: Documented FlagEmbedding library limitation — does not support trust_remote_code or revision. Pin library version instead.

title: Fine-tuning loads models without trust_remote_code=False
resolution: Added trust_remote_code=False to both SentenceTransformer calls in train_tsdae and train_contrastive

title: LLM response parsed without schema validation in augment.py
resolution: Added structural validation: checks each entry is dict with str 'role' key and list-of-str 'aliases'

title: Broader .gitignore patterns for secret-bearing files
resolution: Added .env and .env.* patterns to .gitignore (covered by f-002 fix)
